[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 00000000 a
5 00000000 a
6 00000000 a
7 10000000 1

01 10 10000000 1 match 7
12 21 11000010 3
23 32 00110010 3
34 43 00100000 1
45 54 10000000 1 match 7
56 65 10000000 1 match 7
67 76 10000110 3
70 07 10001000 2

02 20 10000000 1 match 7
13 31 00000010 1
24 42 10100000 2
35 53 00010000 1
46 64 10000100 2
57 75 10011000 3
60 06 10000000 1 match 7
71 17 10000010 2

03 30 00000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 5 6
14 41 10000000 1 match 7
25 52 10010000 2
36 63 00000010 1
47 74 10100100 3
50 05 10001001 3
61 16 10000010 2
72 27 10110010 4

04 40 10000000 1 match 7
15 51 10000000 1 match 7
26 62 10000010 2
37 73 00110010 3
